reason: This is a common Islamic prayer/supplication (dua) from the Quran (20:25-28) asking for guidance and ease. It contains no extremist content or ISIS-related messaging.
taxonomy_labels: Religion and Spirituality -> Prayers and Supplications
original_post: ربي اشْرَحْ لِي صَدْرِي وَيَسِّرْ لِي أَمْرِي وَاحْلُلْ عُقْدَةً مِّن لِّسَانِي يَفْقَهُوا قَوْلِي • ❀
